name: direct-font-size-overrides-conditional
description: Table with firstRow conditional rPr sz=28 (14pt) and bold. Cell (0,0) run has direct sz=20 (10pt).
expected_behavior: Cell (0,0) text: font_size=20 (direct wins over conditional 28). Cell (0,1) text: font_size=28 (conditional applies). Both first-row cells get bold from conditional.
current_status: GAP — code unconditionally overwrites font_size from conditional
